name: picklog
description: Picklog Alpha Slice 1 local-first app and extraction contracts.

scripts.typecheck: sh -c 'for f in packages/shared/src/*.ts tests/*.ts apps/mobile/src/*.ts supabase/functions/extract-url/*.ts; do node --experimental-strip-types --check "$f" || exit 1; done'
scripts.verify: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run check && pnpm run test
